calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Request For Default Prove Up Hearing; Pos
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. apecial appearance for plaintiff Allstate Insurance Company.
Order waiving live testimony of Plaintiff's Witness was in file.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Omar Williams as follows:

Damages/Principal - $32632.71
Attorney's Fees - not requested.
Costs - $414.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $33,046.71 (see scanned doc. for details of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
